name: Fat Baby
rulesText: Poop: Return one enemy monster to its owner's hand. Cry: Choose one monster. That monster cannot use the Attack command against Fat Baby until the end of its controller's next turn.

effectSlots.rulesText: Return one enemy monster to its owner's hand.

effectSlots.rulesText: Choose one monster. That monster cannot use the Attack command against Fat Baby until the end of its controller's next turn.
